title: crucianella turcica
intro: Crucianella turcica, also known as Turkey carline thistle or Turkey cockspur, is a plant species in the mint family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crucianella turcica include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as being used as a treatment for colds and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and teas, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
